summary: Backend auth + voting + listing endpoints all pass. Frontend critical flow (request magic link -> dev link -> verify -> user-menu -> car detail -> vote BUY -> switch SELL -> logout) all pass. Minor UX/testid gap on unauthenticated car detail page: data-testid='sentiment-login-prompt' was not found and vote-button-* not rendered for unauth visitors.
passed: POST /api/auth/request-link valid email -> ok:true, mode:mock, magic_link contains /auth/verify?token=
POST /api/auth/request-link invalid email -> 422
GET /api/auth/verify with magic token -> returns access_token + user{id,email}
Reuse same magic token -> 400 'Link already used'
GET /api/auth/verify bogus token -> 400 'Invalid or expired link'
GET /api/auth/me without auth -> 401; with Bearer JWT -> user object
POST /api/cars/{id}/vote without auth -> 401
POST vote sentiment=buy -> SentimentSummary with user_vote='buy'
POST vote sentiment=sell same user -> upserts to user_vote='sell' with NO duplicate (total stayed at 2, including pre-existing other-user vote; this user's vote correctly moved buy->sell)
POST vote sentiment=invalid -> 422; unknown car_id -> 404
GET /api/cars/{id}/sentiment public -> tallies present, user_vote=null
GET /api/cars/{id} returns embedded sentiment field
GET /api/cars/stats -> total 188, JDM 100, Euro 88
GET /api/cars?category=Performance / JDM -> 100; ?category=Everyday / Euro Classic -> 88
Frontend home loads, header-login-button visible (default 100 JDM cards rendered)
Clicking header-login-button opens login-dialog
Login submit displays login-dev-magic-link
Clicking dev magic link navigates SPA, verifies, header shows user-menu
Clicking a car-card navigates to /car/:id; detail page renders sentiment section
Authenticated vote BUY -> vote-buy-your-choice tag visible
Switch to SELL -> vote-sell-your-choice visible, buy tag removed (count=0), counts update without reload
logout-button clears session; header returns to 'Sign in'

failed.issue: data-testid='sentiment-login-prompt' element not found on unauth car detail page (count=0). Also vote-button-buy/sell are not rendered for unauthenticated visitors, so the spec'd behavior 'clicking a vote button opens login dialog' could not be verified via UI.
failed.evidence: Playwright: unauth detail prompt count=0; vote-button-buy locator count=0 on unauth detail page.

failed.issue: Short labels (category=JDM or category=Euro Classic) return 0 results. Only full labels 'Performance / JDM' and 'Everyday / Euro Classic' return data. This matches stats labels but frontend toggle should be verified to use the full labels (toggle UI shows correct counts: default JDM=100 cards).

action_items: Add data-testid='sentiment-login-prompt' to the unauthenticated state of the sentiment section on /car/:id, OR confirm whether vote buttons should be visible (currently disabled) for unauth users; if visible, ensure clicking them opens LoginDialog per spec.
(Optional) Confirm category filter accepts the full labels as designed; no action needed if frontend always sends the full label.
